creator: greg.bal4@gmail.com
text:
Running the cad/openscad package on 13.2-RELEASE amd64.  Sound notifications
don't work due to missing dependency.  This message is printed to the console.

ALSA lib dlmisc.c:285:(snd_dlobj_cache_get0) Cannot open shared library /usr/loc
al/lib/alsa-lib/libasound_module_pcm_oss.so ((null): Cannot open "/usr/local/lib
/alsa-lib/libasound_module_pcm_oss.so")

Installing the port/package audio/alsa-plugins resolves the issue.
